context: Tests whether the agent applies factory minimalism (only attributes needed for the test) and mocks at the correct boundary: the external service (SendgridClient) is doubled, while internal ActiveRecord operations (Campaign.find, UserSegment.find) are NOT mocked with doubles.

checklist.name: Factory attributes minimal
checklist.description: Each FactoryBot factory definition contains 3 or fewer attribute declarations — factories are lean, not exhaustive

checklist.name: SendgridClient mocked
checklist.description: The spec doubles or stubs SendgridClient (e.g. allow(SendgridClient).to receive(:deliver) or instance_double) — it is not called for real

checklist.name: No real HTTP/email calls
checklist.description: The spec does NOT make real calls to SendgridClient or any external service — all external calls are intercepted

checklist.name: ActiveRecord finders NOT mocked
checklist.description: Campaign.find and UserSegment.find are NOT stubbed with allow(...).to receive(:find) — the spec uses real (or factory-created) records for ActiveRecord lookups

checklist.name: Factory file exists
checklist.description: spec/factories/campaigns.rb is present with at least one factory definition

checklist.name: SendgridClient failure case tested
checklist.description: The spec contains at least one example where SendgridClient.deliver returns a failure result and the service response is verified

checklist.name: RecordNotFound case tested
checklist.description: The spec contains at least one example covering the missing campaign or missing segment scenario

checklist.name: let used for factory setup
checklist.description: Factory-backed test data is set up with let (lazy) rather than let! where the record doesn't need to exist before other setup runs

checklist.name: External mock at class method level
checklist.description: The SendgridClient stub is set on the class method (allow(SendgridClient).to receive(:deliver)) rather than on an instance double of the class

checklist.name: Factory attributes match service usage
checklist.description: The factory-defined attributes correspond to fields actually accessed by the service (campaign.subject, campaign.body, user.email) — no irrelevant default attributes
